description: Integrate Tencent's official iLink Bot API so the agent receives real WeChat messages via long-polling and sends replies through the iLink protocol.

userStories.title: Add iLink config to env schema and .env.example
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to configure the iLink bot token so the runtime can authenticate with WeChat servers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ILINK_BOT_TOKEN (optional string) to src/shared/schema.ts
Update loadConfig in src/shared/config.ts to pass through ilinkBotToken
Add ILINK_BOT_TOKEN to .env.example with placeholder
Update .env with the new variable
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added ILINK_BOT_TOKEN to schema.ts, config.ts, .env.example, .env. All tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement iLink HTTP API client
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a typed HTTP client for the iLink Bot API so the gateway can poll for messages and send replies.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/wechat/ilink-client.ts exporting createIlinkClient(botToken)
Client calls GET /ilink/bot/getupdates with long-polling (POST with get_updates_buf)
Client calls POST /ilink/bot/sendmessage with message payload including context_token
Requests include headers: AuthorizationType=ilink_bot_token, X-WECHAT-UIN (random), Authorization=Bearer token
Client handles HTTP errors with descriptive messages
Focused test in tests/wechat/ilink-client.test.ts uses injectable fetch mock
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 5 tests in ilink-client.test.ts. Auth headers, getUpdates, sendMessage, QR code, error handling.

userStories.title: Implement iLink-based real WeChat gateway
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the runtime to receive real WeChat messages through iLink long-polling instead of simulated injection.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/wechat/ilink-gateway.ts exporting createIlinkWeChatGateway(deps)
Gateway starts a long-polling loop calling ilinkClient.getUpdates()
Inbound messages are parsed: extract from_user_id, text from item_list[0].text_item.text, context_token
Gateway calls onMessage callback with { fromUserId, text, contextToken } for each message
Gateway stores context_token per user in a Map for use by sendReply
Gateway stops polling when stop() is called
Focused test in tests/wechat/ilink-gateway.test.ts uses injectable ilink client mock
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 3 tests in ilink-gateway.test.ts. Long-polling loop, context_token per user, admin boundary check.

userStories.title: Implement real sendReply via iLink
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the agent's replies to be delivered to WeChat users through the iLink API instead of just being logged.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify createDefaultEntrypoint to create a sendReply that calls ilinkClient.sendMessage()
sendReply looks up the user's context_token from the gateway's token store
sendReply falls back to pino logging when bot token is not configured (no-op mode)
sendReply logs via pino at info level when messages are sent
Existing entrypoint tests continue to pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: sendReply uses ilink when token + context_token available, falls back to pino logging. Entrypoint creates ilink client conditionally.

userStories.title: Wire iLink gateway into entrypoint, add QR login CLI, and verify
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a QR login CLI command for initial setup and the runtime to auto-start iLink polling on launch.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify createDefaultEntrypoint to use iLink gateway when ILINK_BOT_TOKEN is set
When ILINK_BOT_TOKEN is absent, gateway falls back to simulated mode (existing behavior)
The bootstrap start() method begins the iLink polling loop
Add 'login' subcommand to src/cli.ts that: calls iLink QR endpoint, prints QR URL, polls status, saves token to .env
Full test suite passes: npm test, tsc --noEmit, npm run build
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: CLI 'login' command added. Bootstrap start() calls gateway.start(). 128 tests pass, typecheck clean, build succeeds.
